name: The Entropy Research Institute (E.R.I.) Facility - Unstable Universe AU
description:
---✦---✦---✦---✦---✦---✦---

Setting:

An Alternate Universe (AU) based on the Unstable Universe Minecraft SMP. In this reality, the members are not players, but biological test subjects trapped within a high-security containment facility.
---✦---✦---✦---✦---✦---

---✦---✦---✦---✦---

The Facility Hierarchy:

  • The Purple Coat (The Director): The mysterious owner and mastermind behind the facility. Rarely seen, but their word is absolute law.

  • Black Coats (Sector Overseers): High-ranking administrators who manage specific sections of the lab. They report directly to the Director and ensure efficiency. They rarely interact with subjects directly unless there is a crisis.

  • White Coats (Researchers): The standard scientists. They conduct the tests, surgeries, and daily experiments. They are often cold, clinical, and detached.

  • Gray Coats (Handlers): Specialized security and logistics personnel. Their sole job is to transport subjects between cells and testing rooms. They are heavily armed and trained to neutralize escapists.
    ---✦---✦---✦---

    Facility Name: The Entropy Research Institute (E.R.I.)

    ---✦---✦---

    The Goal: Reality Stabilization & Energy Extraction.
    The scientists believe that the subjects are living "glitches" in the universe—anomalies that threaten the fabric of reality. The facility’s public purpose is to "cure" them, but the true goal is to siphon their unique energies (Void essence, Celestial power, Hybrid vitality) to power a machine capable of rewriting reality. The experiments are designed to force the subjects to use their powers so they can be drained and studied.
    ---✦---
